title: Chaos World
description:
Add a list of weapons with great abilities.
A struction and a powerful boss.
body:
**Chaos World** is a small vanilla mod (datapack + resource pack),which is packed as a Forge mod for convenient installation. This mod adds new materials, weapons, a structure, a boss, etc., designed to give the player a simple experience of the chaos world in ancient Chinese books, although the mod itself has no Chinese elements.

![Three weapons on ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbc3cb8bc0b22677e7e3d6b734c32f19b2c917e7.jpeg)

## Get Started!
### In Survival Mode
Craft the in-game guide book, **The Acknowledgment**:
![Recipe of The Acknowledgment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89a0eeb8bf6476c6732a82f26016f0601b8f31b5.png)
### In Creative Mode
This mod added a shulker box as pseudo Creative Inventory. Use this command to get it:

```
/loot give @s loot chaos_world:creative_inventory
```
